name: Airship Crash
description: An airship crashes on an unidentified island; players help an expedition team investigate powerful monsters affected by a scattered Ymir Stone.

name: Airship Destruction
description: Players infiltrate and destroy an airship from within, culminating in a battle against Aquila.

name: Airship Raid
description: Players board an airship under attack and must defeat monsters across multiple floors before confronting the possessed Captain Ferlock.

name: Alice Twisted Madness
description: Navigate a twisted labyrinth to help Alice regain her memories and confront an evil villain.

name: Bakonawa Lake
description: Players battle the Bakonawa, a legendary serpent threatening Port Malaya, across three combat phases.

name: Bangungot Hospital
description: Players battle Bangungot and her minions across multiple phases in a haunted hospital.

name: Bioresearch Laboratory
description: Players battle through multiple zones to fight an MVP and obtain Edda weapons.

name: Bios Island
description: A three-floor instance where players eliminate corrupted monsters and face the MVP Reaper Yanku.

name: Buwaya Cave
description: Players fight the boss Buwaya, getting kidnapped into its chest during battle.

name: Central Laboratory
description: Travel to the past and fight 3 randomly spawned MVPs from across Rune-Midgards in a failed experiment scenario.

name: Charleston Crisis
description: Factory instance where players destroy security devices, investigate generators, and defeat Charleston 3 boss.

name: Constellation Tower
description: Major overhaul of Endless Tower featuring randomized floor monsters and unique difficulty system with time restrictions.

name: Cor Mission
description: Daily instance quest requiring players to visit multiple locations, defeat enemies, and battle the MVP EL1-A17T.

name: Devil Tower
description: Parties battle evil shadows and magical seals while assisting Loki to defeat the Evil Believer boss.

name: Endless Tower
description: A 100-floor dungeon with progressively stronger MVPs, culminating in Entweihen Knothen on Floor 100.

name: Endless Cellar
description: A high-level version of the Endless Tower featuring powerful MVPs across multiple floor ranges including Bio 3 MVPs.

name: Faceworm's Nest
description: Instance dungeon featuring five boss fights against Dark Faceworms and a final battle with the Faceworm Queen.

name: Fall of Glastheim
description: Players fight through cursed knights and face the Cursed King Schmidt boss.

name: Geffen Magic Tournament
description: A solo tournament instance where players compete in 13 rounds against progressively stronger opponents.

name: Ghost Palace
description: A solo instance where players confront the corrupted Sakray and face the Torturous Redeemer boss.

name: Hazy Forest
description: A timed instance where players navigate through a forest, defeating monsters and chopping trees on marked islands.

name: Heart Hunter War Base
description: An instance-based war base where players defeat Heart Hunter Guards and an MVP after completing prerequisite quests.

name: Horror Toy Factory
description: A haunted toy factory with 4 areas culminating in an MVP battle against Celine Kimi. All monsters drop Bloody Coins.

name: Infinite Space
description: A 50-chamber instance where players clear rooms of monsters, face MVPs at specific intervals, and earn currency for exclusive gear.

name: Lake of Fire
description: A 60-minute instance where players lure a randomly selected boss into traps to reduce its protection before direct combat.

name: Last Room
description: Players investigate mysterious ruins and confront a rogue AI system in an underground facility.

name: Lost in Time
description: Players navigate through time-twisted areas fighting Pitaya monsters and battling the Boss Meow.

name: Malangdo Culvert
description: Players clean underwater drains of contaminated seaweed and defeat Coelacanth bosses.

name: Memories of Thanatos
description: A 7-floor instance where players traverse memories of Thanatos, facing randomized memory floors and the final boss.

name: Morse's Cave
description: An instance dungeon featuring five phases where parties fight Morroc's minions and ultimately face the MVP Morroc Necromancer.

name: Mysterious Ghost Ship
description: An instance dungeon featuring a ghost ship with multiple decks and a boss captain encounter.

name: Nidhoggur's Nest
description: Parties battle Nidhoggur's Shadow across multiple floors with periodic side-room challenges.

name: Nightmarish Jitterbug
description: A musical-themed instance where players progress through rooms fighting demon mobs including piano-like Jitterbugs.

name: Octopus Cave
description: Players fight through four portal tunnels to defeat Octopus Legs, then face the Giant Octopus MVP boss.

name: Old Glast Heim
description: A challenging dungeon with corrupted beings and powerful MVPs; players progress through two levels before facing Amdarais.

name: Old Glast Heim Challenge Mode
description: Challenging hard-mode version of Old Glast Heim where parties clear monsters on two sides and face MVP bosses.

name: Orc's Memory
description: A soloable instance where players fight the Orc Hero boss after defeating Orc Skeletons.

name: Poring Village
description: An instance where adventurers battle Porings alongside Lunos to claim treasure from Poring Village.

name: Sarah and Fenrir
description: Instance dungeon where players encounter Sarah and Fenrir, choosing to aid either the main character or Professor Bernhard.

name: Sarah's Memory
description: A story instance where players follow Sara through palace areas while defeating guards to uncover the truth about her father Doyen.

name: Sealed Shrine
description: Parties must collect items and defeat the Great Demon Baphomet in an ancient shrine.

name: Sky Fortress
description: A high-level instance where players battle undead forces and face the boss Stefan J.E. Wolf across multiple waves.

name: Tomb of Remorse
description: Players battle undead enemies across four floors, culminating in fights against boss characters Tiara and Sakray.

name: Tower of Trials
description: A 100-floor party-focused endgame instance with random monsters and MVPs; no item drops inside.

name: Villa of Deception
description: Instance dungeon featuring three areas with gimmicks and two boss fights against Schulang and Twisted God Freya.

name: Water Garden
description: Instance dungeon featuring five sections with puzzle mechanics and a boss encounter.

name: Wave Mode
description: A tower defense-style mini-game in a memorial dungeon lasting 1 hour with waves of increasingly powerful monsters.

name: Werner's Laboratory
description: An instance dungeon where players must solve color-coded security puzzles and defeat an MVP.

name: Wolfchev's Laboratory
description: A 4-room instance where players defeat waves of mobs and face a random Bio3 or Bio4 MVP boss.
